For Order Establishing Admissions And For Monetary Sancitons
Off Calendar Jan-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $236.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
